name: Venison Cheese Ball Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely rolled saltine cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in margarine and set aside to cool.
2. In a large covered kettle, combine onion, garlic, mashed tomatoes, tomato juice, tomato sauce, pinto beans, Worcestershire sauce, basil, and pepper.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, mix eggs, Parmesan cheese, thyme, saltine cracker crumbs, and browned venison.
5. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
6. Once the soup has simmered for 30 minutes, stir in shredded cabbage and add the venison cheese balls.
7. Cover and continue to simmer for another 30 minutes.
